testcase.name: FirefoxBrowserTest

error.message: Could not start a new session. Response code 500. Message: Failed to decode response from marionette Host info: host: 'BINIT', ip: '10.141.154.17' Build info: version: '4.45.0', revision: 'cd6a3cd cd6a3cdfca6970f62e5bc8344109d0fe0e2af05e' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.11' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.firefox.FirefoxDriver Command: [null, newSession {capabilities=[Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: true, browserName: firefox, moz:firefoxOptions: {binary: C:\Program Files (x86)\Mozi..., prefs: {remote.active-protocols: 1}}}]}]

testcase.name: EdgeBrowserTest

error.message: no such window: target window already closed from unknown error: web view not found (Session info: MicrosoftEdge=150.0.4078.83) Build info: version: '4.45.0', revision: 'cd6a3cd cd6a3cdfca6970f62e5bc8344109d0fe0e2af05e' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.11' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.edge.EdgeDriver Command: [575a1f813b1ebf25a62896ef063fb3ea, maximizeCurrentWindow {}] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: MicrosoftEdge, browserVersion: 150.0.4078.83, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:processID: 19528, ms:edgeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:65507}, msedge: {msedgedriverVersion: 150.0.4078.83 (7f302606e52a..., userDataDir: C:\Users\singh\AppData\Loca...}, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:65507/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 150.0.4078.83, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: 575a1f813b1ebf25a62896ef063fb3ea
